heards.headline: Platts Oil Diesel Mediterranean Bids, Offers, Trades
heards.body: PLATTS EU MIDDIST PVO MOC TRADES ON CLOSE NO TRADES REPORTED PLATTS EU MIDDIST PVO MOC BIDS ON CLOSE CIF BASIS VENICE PLATTS MED ULSD CRG: APRIL 26-30: BP BIDS AT ULSD CIFMED CRG ANY DAY SEE TQC $50.00 FOR 27000.0MT; TQC: {'MAIN PRICING 18-30 APRIL ; OPTOL 0-6KT, PXG COD +3 QUOTES PREM AS PER MAIN; SPEC: ULSD 10 PPM ITALIAN SUMMER, MIN 60 FLASH; CP: EUROMED NEOBIG EXC Y/FY, INCLUDING SLOVENIA+CROATIA+SOM+TURKISH MED+ROMANIA; VESSEL: BP/SHELL/ENI ; BP - REFINED PRODUCTS IMPORT BAN CLAUSE VERSION 4 TO APPLY'} PLATTS MED ULSD CRG: APRIL 30-MAY 4: BP BIDS AT ULSD CIFMED CRG ANY DAY SEE TQC $40.00 FOR 25000.0MT; TQC: {'MAIN PRICING 25-30 APRIL ; OPTOL 0-5KT, PXG COD +3 QUOTES PREM AS PER MAIN; SPEC: ULSD 10 PPM ITALIAN SUMMER, MIN 60 FLASH ; CP: EUROMED NEOBIG EXC Y/FY, INCLUDING SLOVENIA+CROATIA+SOM+TURKISH MED+ROMANIA; VESSEL: BP/SHELL/ENI ; BP - REFINED PRODUCTS IMPORT BAN CLAUSE VERSION 4 TO APPLY'} PLATTS MED ULSD CRG: APRIL 24-28: TRAFIGURA BIDS AT ULSD CIFMED CRG ANY DAY SEE TQC $52.00 FOR 27000.0MT; TQC: {'MAIN VOLUME 27KT COD +3 ; OPTOL 0-6KT S.O: DIFF AS PER MAIN, PRICING COD +3 QUOTATIONS (COD =0); SPEC: ULSD 10PPM FRENCH SUMMER, C&B, BIO FREE; CP: EUROMED, NEOBIG (EXC YUGO/FORMER YUGO, SYRIA BUT INC CROATIA/SLOVENIA)+TURKEY INC SOM + LIBYA + MOROCCO + OTHER CP OPTIONS AVAILABLE/OBTAINABLE AT COST; VESSEL: KPI/SHELL/ENI; "PARTIES AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THE CURRENT VERSION OF THE STANDARD BP CONTRACTUAL CLAUSE ON THE EU ARTICLE 3MA IMPORT BAN ON REFINED PRODUCTS OBTAINED FROM RUSSIAN CRUDE OIL WITH TRAFIGURA AMENDMENT TO THE "REFINERY ATTESTATION".'} PLATTS EU MIDDIST PVO MOC OFFERS ON CLOSE NO OFFERS REPORTED This assessment commentary applies to the following market data codes: 10 ppm ULSD CIF Genoa/Lavera cargo <AAWYZ00>

instructions:
请用中文总结。格式要求：
1. Heards 按品种分组（原油/成品油/燃料油/LNG）
2. 每条信息单独一行，末尾用 [序号] 标记（如 [1]、[2]）
3. 消息底部用 --- 分隔，然后列出所有链接：[1] URL
4. 序号与链接必须一一对应，不要弄错
5. 不用**加粗**，纯文本
6. 专业术语：MOC=收盘评估, MOPS=普氏均价, bids=买盘, offers=卖盘, partials=窗口成交
